subject: Morning Briefing — May 30, 2026
body:
Morning Briefing — May 30, 2026

• Iran Deal Framework: US & Iran reached tentative agreement to reopen Strait of Hormuz; Trump met advisers but made no final determination. Deal requires Iran renounce nuclear weapons, strait open with no tolls.

• US Politics: Judge ordered Trump's name removed from Kennedy Center; performing arts centre must remain open despite Trump's closure announcement.

• Middle East: US considering options to punish NATO allies deemed unsupportive during Iran war (per Pentagon memo).

• Global: Liverpool sacked head coach Arne Slot after two seasons. Millions of breast cancer patients could safely avoid chemo per new study.
